repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1: studentization-first weak-overlap frontier for DML/LRO/ADML variance-rule separation; v2 shifts to exact report derivatives after v1 collapsed at the common-EIF variance map

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018ECTJ gives sufficient orthogonal-score DML validity; ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO and ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML give LRO/ADML inference, but I found no three-report iff spectral boundary

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1 requested exact published variance summands but did not bank a finite-support audit matrix theorem

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO supplies broad locally robust GMM; ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML supplies automatic Riesz debiasing, but neither classifies ATE LRO normalizations by ADML report equivalence

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The load-bearing objects called exact published DML/LRO/ADML reports are still not pinned to explicit formulas from the cited papers: q_pub, c_{L,A,n}, and c_AD,n are introduced abstractly, so Gamma_{mell,n} and rho_star are not yet canonical.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The variance-order statement uses undefined 'limiting variance lower bound' objects Vcal_{m,n}; the proposal must state whether these are report-ratio limits, studentized-law variances, efficiency bounds, or eigenvalue-normalized report gaps.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The coefficient subspace C_{L,n} 'generated by the LRO first-step normalization' is not mathematically defined, making the projection equality and the non-equivalence complement ambiguous.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem says the certificates reduce to explicit finite matrices, but gives no actual matrix-entry definition or recurrence; as a theorem-level claim, 'explicit finite matrices' is too underspecified.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a report-definition table with the exact DML, LRO, and ADML variance formulas, including the normal equations that determine c_{L,A,n} and c_AD,n and the paper section/equation each formula comes from.
Define C_{L,n} as an explicit linear span/kernel/range with respect to Omega_n, then restate Conjecture 2 as a concrete iff about that space rather than a generated-by-normalization phrase.
Replace the strict ordering of Vcal objects with a precise report-ratio or studentized-limit variance statement, and state how the signs of the generalized eigenvalues imply that ordering.
Include one two- or three-cell worked audit table showing nonzero Gamma_{DML,LRO} and Gamma_{LRO,ADML}; this would separate v2 from the banked v1 failure more convincingly on the repo axis.

recommended_next_step: Revise the mathematical definitions of the exact reports and coefficient spaces before another novelty pass; the flagship idea survives, but the current statements are not yet well-posed enough to accept.
